certificate.caveat: When operated in FIPS mode with the tamper evident seals installed as indicated in the Security Policy and configured according to the Entropy Token Section of the Security Policy. The module generates cryptographic keys whose strengths are modified by available entropy. There is no assurance of the minimum strength of generated keys
certificate.description: FortiManager Network Security Management Appliances were designed to provide security management for large enterprise organizations and service providers. They enable you to centrally manage any number of Fortinet devices, including FortiManager, FortiWiFi, and FortiCarrier™. FortiManager provides the high performance and scalability you need to efficiently apply policies and distribute content security/firmware updates, regardless of the size of your network.
security_level_exceptions: Cryptographic Module Ports and Interfaces: Level 3

validation_history.lab: CGI Information Systems & Management Consultants Inc
